description: Capabilities the renderer is allowed to use. Locked-down for M02 Stage E: only core (window + ipc) and event listen/emit are granted. The renderer never holds the API key, never speaks HTTP, never touches the filesystem. Every privileged action goes through #[tauri::command]. Per spec §10 capability boundary; CLAUDE.md §15 trap #10 (Tauri allowlist is the security boundary).
